summary: First iteration of Park Guru testing. Backend: 9/9 pytest passed on /api/parks, /api/parks/{code}, /api/start-cities, /api/plan-trip (auto+manual+validation). NPS API returned 60 national parks. Frontend: Explore CTA -> plan modal -> city chip (las) -> duration pill (5) -> mode-toggle -> generate-trip-btn -> itinerary-screen all working on mobile viewport (420x900). Mark-visited toggled and persisted. Collection screen renders 60 park tiles with tap toggle. Profile screen shows 7 achievement items. Trips screen renders (empty state in new session — AsyncStorage fresh per browser context, still correct component).

issues: Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking but will break in future RN versions.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo suggests downgrading @react-native-async-storage/async-storage (3.0.2 -> expected 2.2.0) and expo-linear-gradient (55.0.13 -> expected ~15.0.8) for compatibility with installed Expo version. App currently works; monitor for regressions.

action_items: Optional: Replace deprecated shadow*/pointerEvents props with style.boxShadow/style.pointerEvents to silence warnings.
Optional: Align @react-native-async-storage/async-storage and expo-linear-gradient to Expo-expected versions if stability issues surface.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan context manager.
fetch_all_parks raises HTTPException outside request context inside startup warm_cache (caught by try/except — OK).
In-memory cache is process-local; fine for single worker but not for multi-worker deployments.
seed_data_creation: None. NPS API returns live 60 parks; localStorage is ephemeral per browser context.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://park-passport.preview.emergentagent.com. testIDs present: plan-trip-cta-button, plan-modal, city-chip-{id}, duration-{n}, mode-toggle, generate-trip-btn, itinerary-screen, mark-visited-{code}, collection-screen, park-tile-{code}, profile-screen, achievement-*, trips-screen. AsyncStorage resets on new browser context so saved trips won't appear unless created in same session.
